overview.description: The Invesco Preferred ETF (PGX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks an index of fixed rate USD-denominated preferred securities. PGX was launched on Jan 31, 2008 and is issued by Invesco.

data.text: The Federal Reserve recently suggested that the U.S. economy will shrink by 6.5% – its worst annual performance since World War II. The Fed also expects unemployment to finish the year over 9%.
